purpose: Fixed-position terminal-style layout for the original Portal credits page. It places the lyric box, credits box, and ASCII art picture area on a black monospace canvas.
invariants: Dimensions are expressed in em units that match the hard-coded border character counts in portal/cake.js.
The #picture region must stay present for cake.setPicture output.
gotchas: The layout is not responsive; widening or shrinking content can easily misalign the text-drawn borders.
